title: Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2023 base year for residents of Prince Edward Island (quarterly amounts) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) calculation sheet for the 2023 base year for residents of Prince Edward Island (quarterly amounts)

## Jurisdictional basic benefit
Note : The amount for PEI includes the 20 per cent rural supplement, as all residents are eligible. Pending receiving Royal Assent, the rural supplement will double from 10% to 20% as of April 2024.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
